sources.title: 1951 - Fingerprints - Evidence doesn’t lie… unless it’s forged. Directed by Sam Newfield
sources.description:
Fingerprint clues, courtroom twists, and a city on the brink—can science clear an innocent man before it’s too late?
Jim Stover, a meticulous police investigator, gives courtroom evidence so precise it seems unshakable—until doubts creep in and he’s forced to re‑examine the very fingerprints that condemned young artist Paul Moody. As a reform mayor’s death sends shockwaves through city hall, Stover digs into a web of political deals, rackets, and forged evidence where every new print could point to the truth… or another setup.

Original Title: Fingerprints Don't Lie (1951) | AKA: Finger Print Expert / Fingerprints

b&w version https://youtu.be/x3F3Kl0-xRQ

⭐️ STARRING
Richard Travis - James Stover
Sheila Ryan - Carolyn Palmer
Sid Melton - Hypo Dorton
Tom Neal - Prosecuting Attorney
Margia Dean - Nadine Connell
Lyle Talbot - Police Lt. Grayson
Michael Whalen - Police Commissioner Frank Kelso
Richard Emory - Paul Moody
Dee Tatum - Connie Duval
George Eldredge - King Sullivan
Rory Mallinson - Brad Evans
Karl Davis - Rod Barenger
Zon Murray - Defense Attorney
Syra Marty - Syra, the Blonde Model
Roy Butler - Bailiff
Dick Gordon - Nightclub Patron
Forbes Murray - Judge Edwin Monroe
John Roy - Detective
Ferris Taylor - Mayor Wendell Palmer

🎬 CREW
Directed by Sam Newfield (The Terror of Tiny Town, The Monster Maker)
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2gsu7VGzgdbsnmiLvP8gxPJtJcbe5jcE
Written by Orville H. Hampton & Rupert Hughes
Cinematography by Brydon Baker 
Original Music by Raoul Kraushaar (Rocketship X‑M)

🎯 WHY WATCH?
🕵️ Classic Crime • 🎭 Courtroom Suspense • 🎞️ Golden‑Age Noir Vibes

A cool, methodical investigator follows the science straight into a maze of lies and double‑crosses.
Old‑school lab work, magnifiers, and fingerprint close‑ups give this B‑noir a fun, procedural flair ✨
A compact, punchy slice of early‑50s crime cinema where every print, phone call, and check could flip the entire case!

🔔 SUBSCRIBE @CultCinemaClassics

Film Noir • Crime Thrillers • Vintage Mystery • Courtroom Drama • Classic B‑Movies

sources.title: Fingerprints Don't Lie (1951, Crime) Inked for murder: When forensic proof becomes a trap
sources.description:
The killing of Mayor Palmer is being placed on Paul Moody by fingerprint expert Jim Stover as Moody's prints were found on the murder weapon. When reporter Brad Evans places doubt in Stover's mind that the fingerprints were Moodys, he decides to investigate further with the help of the mayor's daughter Carolyn.

Title: Fingerprints Don't Lie (1951) / Finger Print Expert 
Colorized version https://youtu.be/vxTAwtMxaqU

Director: Sam Newfield https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2gsu7VGzgdbsnmiLvP8gxPJtJcbe5jcE
Writers: Orville H. Hampton, Rupert Hughes
Actors: Richard Travis, Sheila Ryan, Sid Melton, Lyle Talbot

Genres: Crime, Drama, Film Noir, Thriller
Release date: February 23, 1951
Filming location: USA

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=UUMOycDFnpMeWzaITQSD1dWsOA
